metadata.description: Security analysis skills for Claude Code: angr (static binary), Frida (dynamic binary), pcap (network capture), and crash triage

plugins.name: angr-analyzer
plugins.description: Static binary analysis with angr: decompilation, CFG recovery, symbolic execution, vulnerability detection

plugins.name: frida-instrument
plugins.description: Dynamic binary instrumentation with Frida: function tracing, API hooking, memory inspection, Stalker tracing

plugins.name: pcap-analyzer
plugins.description: Network capture analysis with scapy: stream extraction, DNS/HTTP parsing, credential detection, anomaly detection, file carving

plugins.name: crash-triage
plugins.description: Crash triage: reproduce a PoC under ASAN/UBSan or a debugger, classify the crash by bug class and exploitability, and emit a severity-ranked verdict with a recommended action
